purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.

skipped_regions.caption_literal: Handwritten letter from the Marqués de Loreto to Antonio Valdés y Bazán, dated 10 October 1784.
skipped_regions.source_context: The printed text on the page identifies this as a letter from the Viceroy of Buenos Aires, Marqués de Loreto, to Don Antonio Valdés y Bazán, dated 10 October 1784, concerning the administration of the Malvinas (Falkland) Islands.
